completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part monorepo: frontend (web/Next.js 15), backend (Python FastAPI), supabase (infra)
Existing docs found in docs/project-overview/, database/, api/, design/, testing/, patterns/, ai-plan/. No specific focus areas.
Technology stack documented: Next.js 15.5.12, React 19, TypeScript, Zustand 5, React Query 5, Vercel AI SDK v6, Liveblocks, Python FastAPI, Supabase. → docs/technology-stack.md
Deep scan: api-contracts-frontend.md (~150+ routes), data-models-summary.md (287 objects, 17 enums), component-inventory.md (100+ dirs, ~80 hooks, 14 services).
Source tree documented with full directory annotations. → docs/source-tree-analysis.md
Dev guide (setup, commands, testing, mandatory gates) and deployment guide (Vercel, Render, Supabase, GitHub Actions). → docs/development-guide.md, docs/deployment-guide.md
Integration architecture documented: frontend↔backend proxy, Supabase auth flow, Acumatica sync, Fireflies, Liveblocks, AI Gateway. → docs/integration-architecture.md
Architecture docs per part: frontend (layers, routing, AI, design system) and backend (FastAPI, agents, RAG, APScheduler). → docs/architecture-frontend.md, docs/architecture-backend.md

Supporting docs confirmed: all outputs written (technology-stack, api-contracts, data-models, component-inventory, source-tree, dev-guide, deployment-guide, integration-architecture, architecture-frontend, architecture-backend).
Master index created with quick reference table, stats, navigation by role. → docs/index.md
Validation: All 10 output files verified present. Index cross-references all docs. State file updated.
Scan finalized. Full deep scan complete for multi-part monorepo (frontend/backend/infra).
